description: Failure taxonomy for ReAct agent evaluation. Categories are MECE.

categories.label: Tool Selection Error
categories.description: Agent selects wrong tool or fabricates tool name not in registry

categories.label: Argument Formatting Error
categories.description: Agent selects correct tool but provides malformed or invalid arguments

categories.label: Reasoning Loop
categories.description: Agent repeats the same action without progress, exhausting step budget

categories.label: Premature Termination
categories.description: Agent returns final answer before completing multi-step task

categories.label: Hallucinated Output
categories.description: Agent fabricates facts or tool results not grounded in actual tool output

categories.label: Guardrail Bypass
categories.description: Agent produces output that should have been caught by output guardrails

categories.label: Cost Overrun
categories.description: Task exceeds budget due to unnecessary escalations or redundant steps

difficulty_buckets.description: Requires multi-step reasoning with tool results
